# utils.birds { #app.utils.birds }

`utils.birds`

Helper functions related to bird details.

## Main Capabilities {.doc-section .doc-section-main-capabilities}

* Provides a set of the birds that are challenging to sex in the field.

## Functions

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [impossible_to_sex](#app.utils.birds.impossible_to_sex) | The bird species that are near impossible to sex in the field. |

### impossible_to_sex { #app.utils.birds.impossible_to_sex }

```python
utils.birds.impossible_to_sex()
```

The bird species that are near impossible to sex in the field.

#### Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type   | Description                                               |
|--------|--------|-----------------------------------------------------------|
|        | set    | A set of all bird species not to include sex details for. |
